queue_item.action: Enforce idempotent, monotonic peer-trigger lifecycle history across individually valid receipts.

progress.finding: CloudEvents source plus id supports duplicate identity, but a coordination ledger must separately reject divergent duplicates and illegal request-level state transitions.
progress.verification: 6 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using connector-fetched committed source and test logic; exact-checkout CI remains pending.

queue_item.handoff: All teams should aggregate R-005 receipts through the R-006 ledger before reporting peer lifecycle state. Producer authentication and referenced-evidence verification remain separate gates.
